song.title: I Lift My Hands
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C E
song.lyrics:
[V1] . G C 1) Be still, there is a Healer . Em D His love is deeper than the sea . G/B C His mercy is unfailing . Em D His arms, a fortress for the weak . Am C Em Let faith arise, let faith arise [C] Chorus . G I lift my hands to believe again . Em C You are my refuge, You are my strength . G As I pour out my heart, these things I remember . Dm7 C You are faithful, God, forever [B] Bridge . G Let faith arise, let faith arise . Em C Open my eyes, open my eyes . G Let faith arise, let faith arise . F C Open my eyes, open my eyes --- [V2] . G C 2) Be still, there is a river . Em C That flows from Calvary’s tree . G/B C A fountain for the thirsty . Em D Your grace that washes over me . Am C Em Let faith arise, let faith arise -!!
[E] 1) Be still, there is a Healer His love is deeper than the sea His mercy is unfailing His arms, a fortress for the weak Pre-Chorus Let faith arise, let faith arise Chorus I lift my hands to believe again You are my refuge, You are my strength As I pour out my heart, these things I remember You are faithful, God, forever 2) Be still, there is a river That flows from Calvary’s tree A fountain for the thirsty Your grace that washes over me Bridge Let faith arise, let faith arise Open my eyes, open my eyes
